subjects.description: A large overhead billboard structure spanning across and above the multi-lane highway, displaying a banking advertisement on the left side and a prominent red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic on the right side.
subjects.appearance_details: Wide rectangular gantry-mounted billboard with a clean white/blue background, glossy printed surface, sturdy steel support pillars on either side of the road; the stop sign graphic is bold red with white border and white 'STOP' lettering.
subjects.relationship: The main visual obstacle and focal point the ego vehicle is approaching and reacting to.
subjects.location: center, spanning the upper portion of the frame above the road
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly, perpendicular to the direction of travel
subjects.pose: Static, fixed structure mounted across the highway
subjects.action: Standing fixed across the road, growing larger as the vehicle approaches
subjects.state_changes: Appears small in the distance at first, then grows progressively larger and dominant in the frame as the ego vehicle approaches and stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen from the driver's first-person perspective with the dashboard and hood partially visible in the lower frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Dark dashboard, slight reflection on the windshield, hood edge visible at bottom of frame; modern sedan interior framing.
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint from which the entire scene is observed; the vehicle reacting to the billboard.
subjects.location: foreground, implied by the ego camera position
subjects.pose: Traveling forward along the lane, then decelerating to a complete stop
subjects.action: Driving on the highway then braking to a full stop near the billboard
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady highway speed to gradual deceleration and finally a complete stationary halt.

background_setting: A wide multi-lane highway approaching a tunnel portal at midday, bright daylight outside giving way to the artificial sodium-and-LED glow inside the underpass, concrete walls and light bands lining the bore. The large overhead gantry billboard spans the road just before the portal, lit by the mixed daylight and tunnel lighting. Moderate traffic funneling toward the mouth.

lighting.conditions: Midday outside, artificial tunnel lighting at the portal
lighting.direction: Bright daylight from above outside transitioning to overhead artificial light bands at the portal
lighting.shadows: Short daylight shadows outside giving way to multiple soft artificial-light shadows near the portal
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright even daylight blending into the warm sodium-LED glow of the tunnel; the billboard face is clearly lit, its red STOP graphic vivid against the concrete and light bands

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective, the highway converging toward the billboard and dark tunnel mouth; dashboard anchors the lower frame, concrete portal framing above
aesthetics.color_scheme: Bright daylight greys shifting to warm sodium amber and cool LED at the portal, with the striking red STOP accent and blue-white bank ad
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings and tunnel light bands receding toward the portal

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from ego vehicle perspective, decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the billboard and road ahead

context: Automotive perception / advertising scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle responding to a stop sign displayed on an overhead billboard

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels at steady speed toward the tunnel portal, the overhead billboard visible before the mouth in bright daylight ahead.

The billboard grows larger as the artificial tunnel light rises; the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become clearly legible in the mixed light as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by the end of this segment.
The vehicle remains fully stopped beneath the billboard at the tunnel portal for the final two seconds.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering centered on a red octagonal sign with a white border
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout, increasingly prominent as the vehicle approaches
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop sign graphic prompting the vehicle to halt

text_and_signage_elements.text: SECURE BANK — Your Future, Our Promise
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Blue and white corporate font with a small shield-style bank logo, clean sans-serif text
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Left portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement occupying the left side of the billboard

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises toward the tunnel portal with the billboard small before the mouth in bright daylight ahead.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow in size; steady forward motion

segments.description: Billboard becomes large and legible in the mixed daylight and tunnel glow; bank ad on left and STOP on right clearly visible as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, reaching a full stop before the billboard by 0:06.
segments.key_changes: Progressive deceleration over four seconds; vehicle slows continuously and reaches a full stop by 0:06; billboard graphics become sharp
segments.camera: Forward tracking decelerating steadily to static

segments.description: Vehicle remains fully stationary beneath the billboard at the tunnel portal for the final two seconds.
segments.key_changes: No motion; scene is held static

temporal_caption: At second 0 the ego car drives forward along a wide highway toward a tunnel portal at midday, bright daylight giving way to the sodium-LED glow of the underpass and the overhead billboard small before the mouth. By second 2 the billboard grows and its layout resolves as artificial light rises. Between seconds 2 and 6 the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become fully legible in the mixed light while the car brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by second 6. From second 6 onward the vehicle remains fully stopped through seconds 7 and 8 at the tunnel portal.
audio_description: Steady tire roll on dry asphalt at speed rises into a boomy, echoing resonance as the tunnel mouth nears. The engine note lowers and brakes engage with a soft whir during deceleration, echoing off the concrete. In the final segment the audio settles to a quiet idle reverberating faintly in the portal. No speech or music.
